name: Gluten-Free Orange Muffins or Quick Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Amaranth Millet or Rice Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients.
2. Mix all liquids; add to dry ingredients.
3. Pour into a well-oiled pan.
4. For muffins, fill cups full and bake at 375°F for 15-20 minutes.
5. For bread, bake for 35-40 minutes or until done.
(Yield: 1 loaf/12 muffins)
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Recipes for Special Dietary Needs" tri-fold Reprinted by permission of Arrowhead Mills, Inc. Electronic format courtesy of: Karen Mintzias
